Table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

Card of table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

Name

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

Code

FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

No RLS as this table is a dictionary

Historization: SCD1

Load type: DELTA

 

VALID_FROM - 1900-01-01 00:00:00

 

select

md5(ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK+VALID_FROM),

md5(ATLAN_ASSET_LABEL_ID_BK+VALID_FROM)

from

(

select A.GUID AS ATLAN_PHYSICAL_ASSET_GUID_BK,

A.ATLAN_ASSET_LABEL_ID_BK

FROM

(SELECT DISTINCT

GUID,

TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) AS ATLAN_ASSET_LABEL_ID_BK

FROM (

SELECT DISTINCT GUID, LABELS

FROM T_ATLAN_EXPORT_PHYSICAL_ASSETS

WHERE LABELS IS NOT NULL

) AS BASE,

LATERAL SPLIT_TO_TABLE(BASE.LABELS, ',') AS SPLIT

WHERE TRIM(SPLIT.VALUE) != ''

ORDER BY GUID, ATLAN_ASSET_LABEL_ID_BK

)A

)


Check constraint name of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

CKT_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL


Server validation rule of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

%RULES%


Code preview of the table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL

drop table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL
--==============================================================
create or replace table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL (
DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
DIM_ASSET_LABEL_KEY VARCHAR(32) not null,
constraint PK_FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL primary key (DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY, DIM_ASSET_LABEL_KEY)
not enforced
);

alter table FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL set comment = 'Factless fact table having Different labels associated with physical assets';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL.DIM_PHYSICAL_ASSET_KEY is
'artificially generated key unique for each physical asset';

comment on column FACT_PHYSICAL_ASSET_LABEL.DIM_ASSET_LABEL_KEY is
'artificially generated unique identifier for each group owner';
